title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup present if Charge Case is on outdated FW
scenario: After updating earbuds via DFU from outdated firmware, the "Case Update Needed" popup appears on the Home Screen, can be dismissed by tapping, and should not reappear after app restart.
steps: Ensure both earbuds and charge case are on outdated firmware.
Observe the Home Screen for a 'Case Update Needed' popup.
Tap the popup to dismiss it.
expected: After restarting the app, the "Case Update Needed" popup should not reappear.
